description: Timed freewriting sprint: start, pause, resume, extend, complete, and post-sprint board transition.

workflows.name: Sprint menu opens with duration options
steps: Navigate to /editor.
Click the Timer chip in the top-right.
Verify the sprint menu opens.
Verify duration options are visible (5 min, 10 min, 15 min, 20 min).
Verify '10 min' is marked as default.

workflows.name: Starting a sprint shows countdown
steps: Open the sprint menu.
Click the '5 sec' option (transition test).
Verify the sprint chip shows a countdown (e.g. '0:05').
Verify the sprint menu closes.

workflows.name: Pause and resume a sprint
steps: Start a 10-minute sprint.
Click the timer chip to open the menu.
Click Pause.
Verify the chip shows 'Paused' with remaining time.
Click Resume.
Verify the countdown resumes.

workflows.name: Extend sprint by 5 minutes
steps: Start a 5-minute sprint.
Open the sprint menu.
Click the +5 min extension button.
Verify the remaining time increases by approximately 5 minutes.

workflows.name: End sprint early resets to idle
steps: Start a sprint.
Open the sprint menu.
Click End sprint.
Verify the chip returns to 'Timer' (idle state).
Verify the board does not appear.

workflows.name: Sprint completes and board animates in
steps: Start a 5-second sprint.
Type a few sentences while the timer runs.
Wait for the timer to reach zero.
Stop typing and wait for idle detection (~2.6s).
Verify the editor zooms out (scale animation).
Verify the node grid container animates in.
Verify the editor content is hidden but still mounted.

workflows.name: Typing exits the board and returns to editor
steps: Complete a sprint and wait for the board to appear.
Start typing in the editor.
Verify the board transitions out.
Verify the editor zooms back in.
Verify typed text appears in the editor.

workflows.name: Explore button reopens the board after dismissal
steps: Complete a sprint and wait for the board to appear.
Start typing to dismiss the board.
Verify an 'Explore' button appears in the top-right.
Click the Explore button.
Verify the board transition starts again.

workflows.name: Starting a new sprint resets the board
steps: Complete a sprint and let the board appear.
Open the sprint menu.
Start a new sprint.
Verify the board is hidden.
Verify the countdown begins fresh.

workflows.name: Overtime label shows when typing after completion
steps: Start a 5-second sprint.
Wait for the timer to expire.
Continue typing.
Verify the chip shows an overtime counter (e.g. '+0:05').
